description_long: This is a large, freestanding digital display monitor mounted on a robust, wheeled stand. The screen is wide and flat, with a sleek black bezel framing the display area, and the front shows a high-resolution image with a digital interface. The stand is solid and rectangular, providing stability, and features four caster wheels for mobility. The rear panel is plain except for a prominent Microsoft logo, and the support column is thick, suggesting internal cable management. The monitor appears to be designed for collaborative or presentation use in public or semi-public urban environments, such as conference rooms, lobbies, or educational spaces. No visible ports or buttons are apparent except for subtle controls on the bezel sides.
description: A large, wheeled digital display monitor with a sleek black bezel and a sturdy rectangular stand, featuring a Microsoft logo on the rear. Designed for mobility and public interaction, it has a high-resolution screen and subtle side controls.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide display screen, black bezel, and digital interface, with the stand and wheels visible below.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the monitor and the depth of the support column and base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back panel, prominent Microsoft logo, and the full width of the stand.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the monitor's slimness and the structure of the support column and base.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is slim, matte black, and has a modern, minimalistic appearance with slightly rounded corners and no decorative elements.
attribute_stand_type: Rectangular pedestal stand with a wide, flat base and four caster wheels, constructed from metal and plastic for stability and mobility.
attribute_button_placement: Physical buttons are located on both sides of the bezel, near the lower corners, and are separated rather than grouped.
attribute_brand_logo: A Microsoft logo is visible on the rear panel, centered on the support column, in a subtle gray color.
